2606.05481.title: Towards Unified and Data-Efficient Prognostics and Health Management with Tabular Foundation Models
2606.05481.paper_summary: Data-driven Prognostics and Health Management (PHM) uses time-varying condition-monitoring data to diagnose system states and estimate remaining useful life in engineered assets. These tasks are central to maintenance planning, but industrial PHM data are often fragmented, partially observed, and poorly labeled, which hinders supervised learning. Foundation models offer a route toward reusable predictive systems, yet most time-series foundation models are designed for forecasting and assume long, coherent, regularly sampled sequences. To address this gap, we propose a framework for applying Tabular Foundation Models to industrial time series using in-context learning, and we evaluate them on a variety of PHM tasks. By converting raw unit-level signals into tabular rows, we show that these models perform well across multiple tasks - including prognostics, and diagnostics - and are highly data efficient. We compare them directly with sequence models, transformer baselines, and gradient-boosted trees under a common evaluation protocol. The results indicate that tabular foundation models achieve the best average ranks across prognostic and diagnostic tasks. Our findings further show that PFN-based models are competitive in low-data regimes, that temporal context can be preserved in the tabular representation, and that performance depends on representative context construction under subsampling. These results demonstrate that tabular foundation models provide a practical and general interface for heterogeneous PHM problems.
2606.05481.paper_summary_zh: 數據驅動的預測與健康管理（PHM）利用隨時間變化的狀況監測數據來診斷系統狀態並估計工程資產的剩餘使用壽命。這些任務對於維護計劃至關重要，但工業PHM數據通常是片段化的、部分觀察的且標籤不佳，這妨礙了監督學習。基礎模型提供了一條通向可重用預測系統的途徑，然而大多數時間序列基礎模型是為預測而設計的，並假設長期、一致、定期取樣的序列。為了解決這一差距，我們提出了一個將表格基礎模型應用於工業時間序列的框架，利用上下文學習，並在各種PHM任務上對其進行評估。通過將原始單位級信號轉換為表格行，我們展示了這些模型在多個任務中表現良好——包括預測和診斷——並且數據效率極高。我們將它們與序列模型、Transformer基準和梯度提升樹在共同的評估協議下進行直接比較。結果表明，表格基礎模型在預測和診斷任務中達到了最佳的平均排名。我們的研究進一步顯示，基於PFN的模型在低數據環境中具有競爭力，時間上下文可以在表格表示中保留，並且性能依賴於在子取樣下的代表性上下文構建。這些結果表明，表格基礎模型為異質PHM問題提供了一個實用且通用的介面。
2606.05481.author: Raffael Theiler et.al.
2606.05481.authors: Raffael Theiler, Lev Telyatnikov, Leandro Von Krannichfeldt, Olga Fink
